UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Public user stats including levels, total XP, current medals, and progression string representation.

displayName.description: Public nick name derived from full name

progress.description: Native nested mapping representing completed lessons, exercises, and scores per unit.

UserPrivateInfo.title: UserPrivateInfo
UserPrivateInfo.description: Strictly isolated private PII structure containing full name, email, and sign up coordinates.

ComplementaryMaterial.title: ComplementaryMaterial
ComplementaryMaterial.description: Material complementar como PDFs, Word ou Planilhas vinculados a aulas e vídeos.

lessonId.description: Id da aula correspondente, ex: aula11

fileData.description: Dados da planilha ou pdf em Base64 ou link direto

url.description: URL web opcional para o link externo

/users/{userId}.description: Gamified user profile database visible in leaderboards

/users/{userId}/private/info.description: Secure, private personal records that only the owner can read

/materials/{materialId}.description: Banco de materiais complementares adicionados por administradores
